item.title: AI Developer Radar｜Daily｜2026-07-01 - Today's Summary
[sustained_hot] Unclecheng-li/VulnClaw (+272 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: 基于 AI Agent + MCP 工具链 + 渗透 Skill 编排， 配合大语言模型， 自然语言输入 → 自动完成「信息收集 → 漏洞发现 → 漏洞利用 → 报告生成」全流程。 Why it matters: MCP / Tool Calling 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +272，总 stars 1,508，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 重点看协议适配、工具注册和真实示例，判断它是否能降低 agent 接工具的成本。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] 0xNyk/council-of-high-intelligence (+415 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: 18 AI personas deliberate your hardest decisions across multiple LLM providers. Aristotle, Feynman, Kahneman, Torvalds & more — structured multi-round deliberation with genuine model diversity. One command: /council Why it matters: AI Agent Framework 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +415，总 stars 2,433，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] diegosouzapw/OmniRoute (+1077 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: Never stop coding. Free AI gateway: one endpoint, 231+ providers (50+ free), connect Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Cline & Copilot to FREE Claude/GPT/Gemini. RTK+Caveman stacked compression saves 15-95% tokens, smart auto-fallback, MCP/A2A, multimodal APIs, Desktop/PWA. Why it matters: Coding Agent / SWE Agent 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +1077，总 stars 9,162，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 关注它如何拆解代码任务、接入工具和处理仓库上下文，可作为 coding agent 产品能力参考。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] altic-dev/FluidVoice (+798 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Other AI Description: Fastest and only macOS Dictation app with on-device STT and custom trained AI enhancement model - Local Wispr Flow alternative. One ⭐ takes us a long way :)) Windows, iOS and Linux coming soon. Why it matters: Other AI 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +798，总 stars 5,283，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] Mebus/cupp (+196 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Other AI Description: Common User Passwords Profiler (CUPP) Why it matters: Other AI 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +196，总 stars 6,206，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 信号存在不确定性，建议先检查 README、最近 commit 和 issue 质量后再投入时间。 Risk: Medium

item.title: [sudden_breakout] automazeio/ccpm (+4 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: CCPM is an Agent Skill that turns AI coding agents into structured project managers using GitHub Issues and parallel Git worktrees for spec-driven, multi-agent development. Why it matters: With 8,166 stars, a 7-day average delta of 2.4, and a sudden acceleration to 2.4 (high), CCPM is experiencing a breakout. The 24-hour delta of 4 and 7-day delta of 17 indicate sustained, accelerating interest. This is not a flash spike but a rapidly growing project with strong community signals. Developer insight: This signals a shift from ad-hoc AI coding to disciplined, spec-driven development. The emphasis on 'no vibe coding' and full traceability suggests that the next frontier for AI coding tools is not just code generation but project management and accountability. Developers should watch for similar patterns in other tools. Risk: Medium

item.title: [sudden_breakout] Tencent/ncnn (+20 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Local LLM / Inference Description: ncnn is a high-performance neural network inference framework optimized for the mobile platform Why it matters: Local LLM / Inference 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +20，前 3 日均值 7，加速度 2.9x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 重点看部署复杂度、性能边界和模型兼容性，判断是否能进入本地 AI 应用栈。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] PatrickJS/awesome-cursorrules (+31 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: 📄 Configuration files that enhance Cursor AI editor experience with custom rules and behaviors Why it matters: Coding Agent / SWE Agent 方向出现突然加速：24h stars +31，前 3 日均值 11.7，加速度 2.7x，今天值得优先排查触发原因。 Developer insight: 关注它如何拆解代码任务、接入工具和处理仓库上下文，可作为 coding agent 产品能力参考。 Risk: Medium
